_comment: Backend reference only. These LaTeX formulas are NOT loaded by the frontend. They document the mathematical principle behind each forensic signal used in the 22-signal MLP pipeline.

signals.name: Boundary Gradient Discontinuity
signals.formula_description: Gradient of image intensity at boundary pixel x_B detects splicing seams.

signals.name: High-Frequency Texture Residual
signals.formula_description: Residual of image after Gaussian low-pass filter reveals high-frequency noise anomalies.

signals.name: Chroma Channel Noise Asymmetry
signals.formula_description: Variance inequality between YUV chroma channels U and V indicates artificial compression.

signals.name: Eye/Mouth Sharpness Mismatch
signals.formula_description: Difference in blur measurement between eye region E and mouth region M.

signals.name: Local Blur / Over-Smoothing
signals.formula_description: Laplacian of local image patch approaching zero indicates artificial over-smoothing.

signals.name: DCT Grid Artifacts (Checkerboard)
signals.formula_description: Inner product of DCT coefficients with a checkerboard mask reveals upsampling artifacts.

signals.name: Bilateral Face Asymmetry
signals.formula_description: Euclidean distance between mirrored landmark sets exceeding threshold delta flags asymmetry.

signals.name: Edge Density Deviation
signals.formula_description: Magnitude of image gradient exceeding camera sensor edge density limit kappa.

signals.name: FFT Ring Artifacts
signals.formula_description: Radial power spectrum integral over angle theta at radius r detects GAN frequency rings.

signals.name: Noise Floor Absence
signals.formula_description: Power in noise band below minimum expected sensor noise floor sigma_min.

signals.name: LBP Texture Entropy Deficit
signals.formula_description: Shannon entropy of Local Binary Pattern histogram; low values indicate synthetic texture regularity.

signals.name: Skin Smoothness Excess
signals.formula_description: Pixel variance in skin patch below natural skin variance threshold indicates artificial smoothing.

signals.name: JPEG Compression Inconsistency
signals.formula_description: Local block quantization matrix differs from global JPEG quantization, indicating splicing.

signals.name: Gradient Phase Coherence
signals.formula_description: Phase angle of image gradient vector; unnatural distributions reveal synthetic generation.

signals.name: Co-occurrence Matrix Irregularity
signals.formula_description: GLCM contrast feature; measures pixel pair intensity differences weighted by squared distance.

signals.name: Spectral Flatness Excess
signals.formula_description: Wiener entropy (geometric mean / arithmetic mean); high flatness contradicts real camera sensor response.

signals.name: Specular Highlight Abnormality
signals.formula_description: Reflection vector R dot view vector V should match half-vector H under Phong lighting; mismatch flags synthetic shading.

signals.name: Facial Contour Over-Regularity
signals.formula_description: Change in curvature kappa along facial contour C; near-zero change indicates unnaturally smooth geometry.

signals.name: Chromatic Aberration Absence
signals.formula_description: Difference in gradient magnitude between red and blue channels at edges; zero difference is physically impossible in real optics.

signals.name: Shadow/Lighting Directionality Loss
signals.formula_description: Dot product of estimated light direction vectors for eye and nose regions; inconsistency flags multi-source compositing.

signals.name: Micro-Texture Frequency Deficit
signals.formula_description: Integral of power spectrum above high-frequency band f_high below threshold theta indicates missing micro-pore texture.

signals.name: Temporal Coherence (Video Only)
signals.formula_description: Root Mean Square Error between consecutive frames F_t and F_{t-1} exceeding psi reveals face-swap frame instability.
